phase-scope.phase-35: Installer flow for operator-provided wildcard TLS certificate paths, validation, env wiring, and reusable deploy installation.

commands.command-3: python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-35.xml docs/modules/M-048.xml docs/verification/V-M-048.xml docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml && mygrace lint
commands.command-4: operator-live: prepared wildcard cert deploy on clean RU VPS, then HTTPS and MTProto-domain smoke with redacted evidence.

module-checks.check-1: install.sh prompts for PUBLIC_DOMAIN, TLS_FULLCHAIN_PATH, and TLS_PRIVKEY_PATH after RU SSH connectivity is available.
module-checks.check-2: Remote validation rejects missing files, unreadable files, empty files, expired certs, mismatched cert/key pairs, and missing base-domain or wildcard SAN coverage.
module-checks.check-3: deploy/deploy-on-server.sh installs validated cert material to /opt/KrotPN/ssl/server.crt and /opt/KrotPN/ssl/server.key with safe permissions.
module-checks.check-4: Production deploy does not silently generate self-signed certificates when operator wildcard TLS is expected.
module-checks.check-5: Generated .env uses the operator domain for DOMAIN, FRONTEND_URL, MTPROTO_BASE_DOMAIN, EDGE_PUBLIC_DOMAIN, EDGE_TLS_CERTIFICATE_PATH, EDGE_TLS_CERTIFICATE_KEY_PATH, and EDGE_TLS_CERTIFICATE_MODE.
module-checks.check-6: No verification output, installer logs, deploy logs, XML files, or smoke scripts print private key contents.
module-checks.check-7: Clean VPS smoke proves HTTP redirect, HTTPS frontend/API/admin, trusted cert chain, and MTProto SNI readiness with prepared wildcard TLS.

scenarios.scenario-1: Operator places /root/krotpn-ssl/fullchain1.pem and /root/krotpn-ssl/privkey1.pem on RU, accepts default krotpn.xyz prompts, and deploy completes with trusted TLS paths.
scenarios.scenario-2: Operator reruns install with the same valid cert paths and the deploy preserves or atomically refreshes TLS material without reissuing certificates.
scenarios.scenario-3: Wrong file path or permission issue aborts before docker compose changes.
scenarios.scenario-4: Mismatched key, expired cert, or SAN mismatch aborts before replacing /opt/KrotPN/ssl files.
scenarios.scenario-5: Self-signed fallback is unavailable in production mode unless explicitly selected for dev/test.

redaction-rules.rule-1: Never print private key contents, certificate PEM bodies, .env secrets, MTPROTO_BASE_SECRET_HEX, MTPROTO_SECRET_SALT, JWTs, refresh tokens, or email verification tokens.
redaction-rules.rule-2: Logs may include the domain, redacted paths, certificate issuer, notAfter date, and validation status.
redaction-rules.rule-3: Operator-live evidence must redact server passwords and should not include full shell traces around secret-handling commands.

live-smoke-gates.gate-1: DNS for krotpn.xyz points to the target RU edge host.
live-smoke-gates.gate-2: Wildcard certificate files are present on RU before install starts.
live-smoke-gates.gate-3: Installer validation passes without printing private key contents.
live-smoke-gates.gate-4: curl -I http://krotpn.xyz returns a redirect to https://krotpn.xyz.
live-smoke-gates.gate-5: HTTPS frontend, /api health, and /admin route respond with the trusted wildcard certificate.
live-smoke-gates.gate-6: One issued MTProto SNI under the wildcard domain is ready for the existing M-046/M-044 live smoke.

autonomous-execution-safety.safe-local: bash syntax checks, source static smoke, XML parse, and MyGRACE lint are safe locally.
autonomous-execution-safety.requires-operator: Real cert files, live DNS, clean VPS install, public HTTPS smoke, and MTProto client proof require operator control.
